items.title: Unit Tests
items.description: Unit-level coverage is what most teams track first; integration tests usually report coverage separately.

items.title: Fixtures & Mocks
items.description: Mocks may give you 100% coverage of your code while leaving real-dependency behaviour untested; coverage doesn't catch that.

items.title: Property-Based Testing
items.description: Property tests can dramatically increase *branch* coverage by generating inputs that hit rare paths.

items.title: Pull Requests & Reviews
items.description: CI commonly enforces a coverage floor (or diff-coverage on the PR) before allowing merge.

items.title: Git Workflows
items.description: Coverage gates usually sit alongside lint/type checks in the CI pipeline that protects `main`.
